none.justification: Lists all 10 GT references with correct files and lines: five in src/utils/eloop.c and five in src/utils/eloop_win.c, including both definitions and all call sites. It also correctly reports that none are string-literal or comment occurrences.

ccodegraph.justification: Matches the complete GT set of 10 references with correct file:line entries and no false positives. The compile_commands note does not incorrectly exclude eloop_win.c; it still counts the Windows backend because the question is scoped to src/.

codegraph.justification: Fully matches the GT: all 10 references, split 5/5 across the two backend files, with correct line numbers and kinds. It also correctly distinguishes the helper from the public cancel APIs and notes no string/comment hits.

cbm.justification: Gives the complete correct set of 10 file:line references and correctly includes both platform backends with no false positives. Some call-site descriptions are a bit imprecise for the cancel_timeout_one lines, but the required references and exclusion handling are correct.
